named-native-query.name: getAllExcelTemplatesList
named-native-query.query: SELECT et.name AS excelType, et.content AS excelFile, uatA.username AS createdBy, uatB.username AS updatedBy, et.created_time AS createdAt, et.updated_time AS updatedAt FROM excel_template et WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN user_auth_table uatA WITH (NOLOCK) ON uatA.id = et.created_by INNER JOIN user_auth_table uatB WITH (NOLOCK) ON uatB.id = et.updated_by

named-native-query.name: getUserProfileDetails
named-native-query.query: SELECT updt.* FROM user_profile_details_table updt WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN user_auth_table uat WITH (NOLOCK) ON uat.id = updt.user_id WHERE uat.username = :username
